name: STIR-FRY NOODLES
description: Stir-fries are great go-to dishes for any night of the week. Once you've mastered a few different recipes you can start experimenting with different combinations and whatever you've got left in the fridge. Become a stir-fry ninja and a world of culinary skill becomes awaits you.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons oil into a hot wok
method: Drop 2 tablespoons oil into a hot wok
Prepare your noodles following instructions on the packet (they might need soaking before they go into your dish depending on which type). Vegetable (250g noodles will serve 4 people). Dairy and eggs
Trim and finely chop your aromatics and add into the wok and start frying
Trim and finely slice the vegetables and add them to the pan (150g total veggies will serve 4 people)
Drizzle over some of the liquid base, everything together. Stir-fry for 2-6 minutes
Season your stir-fry and transfer to plates
Finish off your stir-fry with the garnish of your choice
